task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: Remove the transport locking material from the printer

abstract.p: How to remove the transport locking material from the printer at installation.

li.p: Open ended spanner 19 mm or Allen key wrench 6 mm

note.p: Avoid skin contact with ink: wear protective gloves.
Protect your eyes from splashing ink: wear safety glasses.

entry.p: Remove the media input middle cover:

li.p: Remove the 2 screws at the bottom.
a plastic bag with small bags with grease (for the ink pump tubes)
left and right hand side winder drive

entry.p: Place the 4 height adjustment blocks and disks under the 4 height adjustment bolts.
Turn out the 4 height adjustment bolts (Open ended spanner 19 mm or Allen key wrench 6 mm) until the wheels are just off the floor.
Aim: Printer is not pushed away during the removal of the transport locking brackets.

note.p: If needed: apply some grease to the 4 threaded rods to prevent damage and make rotating easier.

li.p: Remove 3 screws (3 x T30) on the right side of the bracket .
Loose 2 screws (T20) on the left side of the bracket

entry.p: Unlock with the green handle and open the maintenance unit.

li.p: Remove the transport bracket of the top cover.

entry.p: Remove the 2 foam blocks of the buffer.
Unlock with the green handle and open the manual maintenance door.
Remove the 4 screws of the top cover transport locking mechanism:

li.p: Remove first the 2 screws at the top of the triangle.

note.p: Do not lean on the strip support.

li.p: Remove the red triangle locking mechanism with the bottom 2 screws at the bottom.
Place the 2 screws at the bottom back in the frame.

entry.p: Remove the transport locking bracket (3 screws) in the top cover.
Remove the 2 transport brackets of the guidance (4 screws each).
Install the front screw at the left and right hand side back again.

li.p: Remove the tape and foam from the printhead carriage and guide (4x).

note.p: Check that the ruler is positioned correctly between the guidance in the middle of the platen (print surface).

entry.p: Remove the tape and foam below the curing carriage.
Remove the 2 x 2 locking bolts of the printhead carriage.
Remove the 2 transport brackets (2 x 2 screws).
Remove the tape and the plastic bag.

li.p: 2 protection caps of the optical fiber cable

entry.p: Remove the cable tie and plastic from the curing carriage drive belt.

li.p: Cut the cable tie of the curing carriage drive chain (winder side)
Pull at the drive belt and move the printhead carriage to the right hand side (Ink bottles).
Pull at the drive belt and move the curing carriage to the left hand side (chiller).
Remove the tape from the maintenance unit.
Mount the winder assembly at the right hand side (4 nuts (7 mm)).
Connect the connector 19X8 to the winder.

entry.p: Mount the winder drive assembly at the left hand side (4 nuts (7 mm)).
Connect the 2 connector 19X6 and 19X7 to the winder.

note.p: Do not to damage the encoder when you slide the assembly in place.

p.draft-comment: -----Sjaak vragen plaat die voor het blok zit doorzichtig maken-----

entry.p: Move the 2 screws upwards (locking block is moved upwards).
Remove the tie-rap from the ink handling unit hinge.

li.p: Loosen the screw (T25) (at the top) of the cover of the knife compartment.
Lift and remove the cover of the knife compartment.

entry.p: Remove the cover below the knife compartment (3 screws).

li.p: Remove the 2 screws of the ink handling unit

note.p: Remove the screw on the other side behind the maintenance drawer lid; otherwise, you cannot open the door.

li.p: Remove the hand side cover of the winder see: 24 How to remove the left (or right) hand side cover of the winder

entry.p: Remove the rear top cover of the ink system.
See 02 How to remove the rear top cover of the ink system.

note.p: The ink pump tubes are outside the ink pump.

li.p: Do 02 How to install and grease the pump tubes

note.p: Check the position of the ink tubes and colors:
02 Overview of the colors of the ink system and the printhead carriage.

entry.p: Install the rear top cover of the ink system.
See 02 How to remove the rear top cover of the ink system.
Move the screw upwards (locking bracket is moved upwards).

li.p: Cut and remove the 2 cable ties of the roll core.
Cut and remove the 2 cable ties at the locking handle of the vertical transport.

entry.p: Remove the cover from the media drawer.
See: 00 How to level the printer
